mcps.name: Cloudflare
mcps.description: Cloudflare management — DNS records, tunnels, Zero Trust (users, devices, access groups, device profiles, WARP split tunnels, tunnel routes, local domain fallback, device settings), Gateway DNS/HTTP/network policies and lists, SSL/TLS, firewall rules, IP access rules, cache, and zone analytics via REST API

mcps.name: Duplicacy
mcps.description: Duplicacy backup monitoring — storage configs, schedules, backup status, backup history, job logs, and health checks via SSH + HTTP API

mcps.name: FortiGate
mcps.description: FortiGate 60F firewall — policies, address objects, service objects, DHCP, static routes, VPN, bandwidth stats, system health, FortiSwitch management, and FortiAP/WiFi management via REST API

mcps.name: HomeKit
mcps.description: Homebridge smart home control — accessory listing, characteristic control, bridge management, plugin config, and system monitoring via REST API

mcps.name: HPE iLO
mcps.description: HPE iLO 4 server management — system info, processors, memory, storage, network adapters, temperatures, fans, power supplies, power control, indicator LED, iLO management, event logs, firmware inventory, virtual media, and license info via Redfish REST API

mcps.name: NetBox
mcps.description: NetBox IPAM — IP addresses, prefixes, VLANs, VRFs, IP ranges, services, devices, interfaces, sites, and infrastructure search via REST API. Supports NetBox 4.5+ v2 tokens (auto-detects nbt_ prefix, uses Bearer vs Token header).

mcps.name: iperf3
mcps.description: iperf3 network diagnostics — bandwidth testing between hosts with configurable protocols, duration, and parallel streams via SSH + docker exec

mcps.name: Media Stack
mcps.description: Unified media automation — Sonarr (TV series), Radarr (movies), and SABnzbd (downloads) management with queue monitoring and health checks via REST APIs

mcps.name: NGINX Proxy Manager
mcps.description: NGINX Proxy Manager — reverse proxy hosts, SSL certificates, redirection hosts, streams, and health monitoring via REST API

mcps.name: Observability
mcps.description: Full observability stack — Prometheus (PromQL queries, metric discovery, targets, alerts, rules, TSDB stats), Loki (log queries, label discovery, series, stats), Alertmanager (alerts, silences, receivers, status), and Grafana (dashboard search, annotations, folders) via HTTP APIs

mcps.name: Overseerr
mcps.description: Overseerr media requests — search, movie/TV details, request management, approval workflows, user quotas, and health monitoring via REST API

mcps.name: Pi-hole
mcps.description: Pi-hole DNS management — CNAME records, ad-blocking, domain blocking, client stats, and upstream health via SSH + docker exec

mcps.name: Plex
mcps.description: Plex Media Server — library browsing, search, metadata, on-deck, playlists, active sessions, and library scanning via REST API

mcps.name: Shelly
mcps.description: Shelly device management — energy monitoring, power metrics, switch control, temperature, WiFi status, and firmware updates via Gen2/Gen3 RPC API

mcps.name: Tautulli
mcps.description: Tautulli Plex monitoring — current activity, watch history, library stats, recently added, user analytics, and server health via REST API

mcps.name: Unimus
mcps.description: Unimus network config management — device inventory, config backups, diffs, change tracking, scheduled backups, and discovery via REST API

mcps.name: UNRAID
mcps.description: UNRAID server management — containers, VMs, shares, disks, temperatures, and system commands via SSH

mcps.name: Uptime Kuma
mcps.description: Uptime Kuma monitoring — monitors, heartbeats, uptime stats, status pages, Docker hosts, and Prometheus metrics via Socket.IO

mcps.name: Vaultwarden
mcps.description: Vaultwarden/Bitwarden secrets management — vault auth, item/folder CRUD, search, credential retrieval, TOTP, password generation with full client-side encryption (PBKDF2/Argon2, AES-CBC, HMAC-SHA256). Supports Vaultwarden 1.32+ camelCase API.
